description:
Goal: execute compiler2 macro functions as compile-time Fz code over the same Fz-shaped quoted AST values produced by the parser and consumed by source production, without the old `CompileTimeEvaluator`, `exec::Value` AST codec, or repeated AST format conversion.

Signal:
- a local `defmacro inc(x) do quote do: unquote(x) + 1 end end` can run during source production and return a new `root` in the same source heap
- macro functions receive `__CALLER__` plus quoted argument roots in the same heap; args are not evaluated and are not decoded to Rust AST first
- macro return values are roots in the same heap; recursive expansion can consume `{heap, returned_root}` directly
- quote/unquote allocate and splice values in that heap, preserving lexical context metadata
- macro execution errors surface through compiler2 diagnostics/telemetry with call-site and definition context
- no fz2 path calls `frontend::macros::expand_program_with_types`, `exec::ast_value`, or the scratch `CompileTimeEvaluator`

Change:
- add compile-time process/interpreter entry points for macro functions defined by compiler2 services
- define the macro ABI as `{heap, call_root} -> returned_root`, where the call frame supplies `__CALLER__` and quoted arg roots from `heap`, and `returned_root` must be valid relative to that same `heap`
- implement quote/unquote over the compiler2 Fz-shaped quoted source value model in-place on the active source heap
- validate/root returned AST values before recursive expansion continues, without decoding them through a Rust AST representation
- reject or diagnose any attempt to return a root from a different heap/world
- define deterministic macro execution limits/signals for recursion/runaway expansion
- add telemetry for macro execution start/stop/error carrying raw ids/source facts, not formatted strings

Why:
- the old evaluator proves the semantics, but its value model and whole-program preload are the wrong substrate
- macros are ordinary compiled compile-time functions over Fz data; their only authority is returned source roots and compiler-service calls
title: Compiler2 macro runtime: execute defmacro functions on a compile-time process heap
